author: anon-59ff128d
content: The double-negation condition `if cli.json || (!stdin_is_tty && !cli.no_json)` is eliminated. In the new resolve_mode() function, the logic reads as positive assertions: `let stdin_eligible = !stdin_is_tty && !cli.no_json; let want_json = cli.json || stdin_eligible;` — each named binding makes the intent clear. The nested else-if branches are gone; run() dispatches via a flat match on Mode variants.
